result.title: Add a 'View on explorer' deep-link to each on-chain action in ProjectWallet
result.prepBrief:
## Agent assist brief — loop task #116

**Title:** Add a 'View on explorer' deep-link to each on-chain action in ProjectWallet
**Priority:** 7 · **Complexity:** M (~90m)
**Keywords:** each, on-chain, action, projectwallet, add, view, explorer, deep-link

### Detail
Holders should be able to verify every treasury movement themselves. Each row in the ProjectWallet on-chain action list should link to solscan for the tx. Keep the api read-only and test the mobile layout of the wallet panel.

### Checklist
1. Clarify success criteria for: Add a 'View on explorer' deep-link to each on-chain action in ProjectWallet
2. Read related code / existing UI before editing
3. Implement smallest shippable change
4. Add or update tests / typecheck
5. Verify on local or preview
6. Double-check money-path guardrails (no unguarded transfers)
7. Check mobile + desktop layout

### Acceptance hints
- Must include automated test
- Must improve holder-facing honesty
- Must work on small screens
- Must keep public API read-only safe

_Prepared by Loop Compute device for the project agent._
